layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Project configuration files including package.json, Vite bundler config, and ESLint rules.

layers.name: Entry Point
layers.description: Application entry points â€” React root component and main mount point.

layers.name: Pages

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the project purpose â€” a React + Vite portfolio application with Tailwind CSS styling.

tour.title: Application Entry
tour.description: The app boots from src/main.jsx, mounting the root React component defined in src/App.jsx with React Router for navigation.

tour.title: Pages & Routing
tour.description: Page-level components define the main routes. ProjectsPage manages the project showcase with filtering and voice interaction.

tour.title: UI Components
tour.description: Reusable components including the Hero section, Navbar, About section, Experience timeline, Skills display, Testimonials, Blog, Contact, and Footer. Modals provide expanded views for projects, booking, testimonials, blog, and voice interaction.

tour.title: Modal Components
tour.description: Detail modals for projects, blog posts, booking, testimonials, and the interactive terminal and voice assistant.

tour.title: Custom Hooks
tour.description: Reusable hooks for scroll-triggered animations (useScrollReveal), smooth scrolling (useLenis), magnetic hover effects (useMagnetic), and animated counters (useCounter).

tour.title: Data & Content
tour.description: Static data files that drive the portfolio content â€” projects, skills, experience, testimonials, and blog posts.

tour.title: Styling & Configuration
tour.description: Tailwind CSS styles and Vite bundler configuration define the build pipeline and visual theme.

project.name: portfolio-app
project.description: A React + Vite portfolio application with Tailwind CSS styling, featuring smooth animations, interactive components, and voice interaction capabilities.
